---
title: "Speakers"
---

::: {.speaker-gallery}

::: {.speaker-profile}
![](assets/img/speakers/alessandro-bonetti.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr Alessandro Bonetti"}

### Dr Alessandro Bonetti

AstraZeneca
<!-- 
[![](assets/img/speakers/alessandro-bonetti.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Alessandro Bonetti"}](URL){target="_blank"}

### [Dr Alessandro Bonetti](URL){target="_blank"}

AstraZeneca -->
:::

::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/gab-corso.jpeg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr Gabriele Corso"}](https://gcorso.github.io/){target="_blank"}

### [Dr Gabriele Corso](https://gcorso.github.io/){target="_blank"}
Co-founder and CEO at Boltz 

:::


::: {.speaker-profile}
[![](assets/img/speakers/tiansi-dong.jpg){.speaker-profile-photo fig-alt="Dr Tiansi Dong"}](https://www.cst.cam.ac.uk/people/td540){target="_blank"}

### [Dr Tiansi Dong](https://tiansidr.github.io/){target="_blank"}

Alan Turing Institute<br>
University of Cambridge
:::


:::
